response: Acme Corp, headquartered in Austin, TX, with 342 employees, reported quarterly revenues of $12.3 million in Q1, $14.1 million in Q2, $11.8 million in Q3, and $16.2 million in Q4, totaling $54.4 million for the year. This performance reflects an impressive year-over-year growth of 18%. Overall, the company demonstrated strong financial momentum throughout the year.
